race.description: The Country Club St Georges Basin Hcp (C3)
race.comment: WRITTEN BY LUCY (8) in career best form with the two wins from her last three starts and races best with the sting out of the ground. Stalked the speed and showed good acceleration with an effortless win over 1200m at Canberra. Big chance again despite drawing a sticky gate. FINE WINE (6) frustrating filly who drops back a level for this fifth-up. Went back from the outside gate and never got into the contest when eighth over 1150m at Illawarra Grange. Tempo suits and worth another chance. RIDE THE RIVER (1) racing well this prep and likely to push forward and give a ton of cheek. MILLY MOLLY MANDY (10) also looks one of the genuine hopes in the race.
